source: Startup FutureWarning — 'All support for the google.generativeai package has ended'
title: Migrate Gemini provider from deprecated google.generativeai to google.genai
what_failed: Every Pi startup printed a FutureWarning: 'All support for the google.generativeai package has ended. It will no longer be receiving updates or bug fixes.' The package still works but will eventually break.
where_failed: core/providers/gemini.py used the old `import google.generativeai as genai` SDK with the configure() + GenerativeModel() + start_chat() API.
why_likely: google-genai is the new official SDK; the old one was a transitional package.
suggested_fix: Rewrite GeminiProvider to use the new SDK: `from google import genai; client = genai.Client(api_key=...)`; `client.models.generate_content(model=..., contents=..., config=types.GenerateContentConfig(...))`. Update anthropic_to_gemini_tools to emit types.Tool / types.FunctionDeclaration. Public interface (chat/ping) unchanged.
